books.title: Creative Bible Study
books.description: In order to speak God's words you must first know what God has said. This course equips you to understand God's Word.

books.title: Divine Provision
books.description: We are living in a time of tremendous financial instability. This book will prepare you personally and your ministry corporately.

books.title: Environmental Analysis
books.description: This course introduces principles of environmental analysis necessary for organizing and mobilizing spiritual resources for evangelizing.

books.title: Foundations of Faith
books.description: The basic doctrines of the Christian faith are the subject of this course.
